properties.entry: insert ignore into date_dim(date) ( select distinct date(t1.poll_time)-interval weekday(t1.poll_time) day from tplink_deco_device_info_stg t1 left join date_dim dd on (date(t1.poll_time)-interval weekday(t1.poll_time) day) = dd.date where dd.date_key is null )

insert ignore into time_dim(time) ( select distinct time_to_sec(time(t1.poll_time)) from tplink_deco_device_info_stg t1 left join time_dim td on time_to_sec(time(t1.poll_time))=td.time where td.time_key is null )
select * from tplink_deco_device_info_stg order by id -- order id to get increasing time (id is primary key and indexed, ordered, but we want it more explicit)
insert into tmp_ap_dim_normalize values(?,?)
drop table tmp_ap_dim_normalize;

insert ignore into ap_dim(ap_mac,ap_name) ( select distinct t1.ap_mac, t1.ap_name from tmp_ap_dim_normalize t1 left join ap_dim t2 on t1.ap_mac=t2.ap_mac and t1.ap_name=t2.ap_name where t2.ap_key is null );
insert into tmp_ip_dim_normalize values(?)
drop table tmp_ip_dim_normalize;
insert ignore into network_statistics.ip_dim(ipv4) ( select distinct t1.ipv4 from tmp_ip_dim_normalize t1 left join ip_dim t2 on t1.ipv4 = t2.ipv4 where t2.ip_key is null );
create temporary table tmp_ap_connection_lost_daily_fact ( `ap_date` date, `ap_mac` bigint, `ap_name` varchar(255), `ap_ip` int, `cnt_lost` int )
insert into tmp_ap_connection_lost_daily_fact values (?,?,?,?,?)
drop table tmp_ap_connection_lost_daily_fact

insert into ap_connection_lost_daily_fact(date_key, ap_key, ip_key, lost_cnt) ( select dd.date_key, ad.ap_key, id.ip_key, app_exec_tbl.cnt_lost -- remember to use different column name from target column name when upserting
from tmp_ap_connection_lost_daily_fact app_exec_tbl
join date_dim dd on dd.date_key=( select date_key from date_dim where app_exec_tbl.ap_date=date )
join ap_dim ad on ad.ap_key=( select ap_key from ap_dim where app_exec_tbl.ap_mac=ap_mac and app_exec_tbl.ap_name=ap_name )
join ip_dim id on id.ip_key=( select ip_key from ip_dim where app_exec_tbl.ap_ip=ipv4 ) ) on duplicate key update lost_cnt=lost_cnt+values(lost_cnt)
insert into tplink_deco_device_info_archive(poll_time, raw_data) select poll_time, raw_data from tplink_deco_device_info_stg
drop table tplink_deco_device_info_stg
create table if not exists tplink_deco_device_info_stg like tplink_deco_device_info_stg_ingest

rename table tplink_deco_device_info_stg to tmp_tplink_deco_device_info_stg, tplink_deco_device_info_stg_ingest to tplink_deco_device_info_stg, tmp_tplink_deco_device_info_stg to tplink_deco_device_info_stg_ingest
